description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a Blue Jay, featuring a streamlined body with a prominent blue tail and wings marked by black barring and white highlights. The bird's back and upper wings are a soft blue, while the underparts are pale grayish-white. Its head is adorned with a subtle crest, and the face displays a black line running from the beak, through the eye, and around the nape, forming a partial collar. The beak is straight, medium-length, and conical, suited for cracking seeds. The tail is long and slightly rounded, with distinct blue and black barring visible from above.
description: A detailed Blue Jay with blue and black barred wings and tail, pale underparts, and a straight conical beak. The bird features a subtle crest and a black facial line.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue and black barred tail, pale underparts, and the bird's crest and beak profile.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the blue tail with black barring and the symmetry of the wings folded along the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same blue and black barred tail, pale belly, and the bird's head and beak from the other profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, beak, and subtle crest, with the wings and tail receding behind.
attribute_plumage_pattern: blue and black barring on wings and tail, white underparts, black facial line and collar
